chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-721 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No.9104/2020. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.9105/2020. 4. For hearing of main case. 21.12.2020 Miss. Noshen Qureshil, Advocate for the Applicant. ==== 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that the private respondents have deprived the applicant of their money by practicing fraud with him, therefore, learned VIIIth Additional Sessions Judge / Ex-officio Justice of Peace, Hyderabad ought to have issued directions against police to record the F.I.R of the applicant, by not doing so by way of his order dated 03.12. 2020, he has committed illegality which is liable to be corrected by this Court by way of instant criminal miscellaneous application. Apparently, there is dispute between the parties over settlement of account. If, for the sake of argument it is believed that a cognizable offence is made out, then the applicant could prove the same adequately by having a recourse under section 200 Cr.P.C without involvement of the police. No illegality is pointed out in impugned order which may justify this Court to make interference with it, in exercise of its inherent jurisdiction under section 561-A Cr.P.C. Consequently, the instant Criminal Misc. Application is dismissed in limine. JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*
